name: civil-materials-skills
description: Civil engineering and construction materials research skills for producing work at top-journal standard. Covers research routing, paper reading, citation mapping, manuscript writing, academic polishing, figure creation, data/FAIR packaging, peer review simulation, reviewer response drafting, paper-to-PPTX conversion, and real PPTX generation. Specializes in waterborne epoxy modified emulsified asphalt (WER-EA), asphalt pavement materials, cement/concrete, durability, and sustainability.
